items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Original cancellation → follow-up auto-cancels'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate a specific requirement regarding the auto-cancellation of follow-up appointments upon the cancellation of the original surgery booking. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this auto-cancellation feature in the current saga run. The linked use case mentions the requirement, but without concrete evidence of the implementation, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
